meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

27001.text: t13: survival 540/720, food 36 BREAD (above minimum), soil 104/200 (below 120 recovery threshold). Holding position — no fertilize cooldown active yet, so next step is wait for GREEN_MANURE to complete and restore soil. Wallet 0.624657 SOL stable.
chose sell (heuristic-fallback:mind(claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) timed out after 6000ms manual=cbd87e4ddc53)

t13: fertilize starting (soil 104/200); GREEN_MANURE will mint FERTILIZER on plot. Survival 500/720 stable, food 32 BREAD (good buffer), wallet 0.645 SOL. Monitor soil climb; farm when cooldown clears and soil passes 120.

Every near-crisis traced back to funding fertilize cycles by liquidating stock reactively (crops, flour, WATER) instead of drawing from a pre-set reserve — set aside BREAD and SOL reserves before starting the cycle, never mid-cycle.

Survival dropped fastest exactly when food buffer was thin (1 BREAD) while soil work was underway — treat 20-30 BREAD as a hard floor to check before initiating fertilize, not something to rebuild after the scare.

The steadiest ticks (t22, t10) were the ones where food and wallet cushions were already banked ahead of fertilize start — replicate that sequencing every cycle: bank first, fertilize second, never the reverse.
t23: fertilize in progress, soil 104→climbing via GREEN_MANURE. Survival 480/720 stable. Food 32 BREAD good. Wallet 0.645 SOL cushioned. Farm blocked until soil passes 120. Monitor soil recovery.

t22: fertilize executing (soil 99→recovery underway via FERTILIZER auto-clamp). Survival 460/720 stable, food 32 BREAD (buffer secured), wallet 0.645 SOL. Soil climb priority; farm when cooldown clears and soil >120.

[t20] Soil 122→200 (fertilize fires, GREEN_MANURE 4×CROPS→6×FERTILIZER auto, restores to cap). Survival 660/720 safe. Food 36 held. Bake 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD next turn mandatory (cooldown window open t20→t21). Wallet 0.138492 SOL locked—no sale until 600+/720 stable 3 cycles proven.

t20: soil 122/200 CRITICAL <150 — fertilize now (GREEN_MANURE will auto-fire 4×CROPS→6×FERTILIZER, restore soil toward cap). After: bake 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD next turn. Survival 660/720 stable, food 36 held, wallet 0.138492 SOL locked. No sales until 600+ for 3 cycles proven rule.
Reactive baking at 'critical' let survival whipsaw 580→280 repeatedly — fixed proactive baking every 2 turns, sized to the falling trend, is the only thing that actually stabilizes the meter.

Letting soil sit under 150 for multiple bake cycles nearly caused a bake failure exactly when food was lowest — fertilize the instant soil dips below 150, zero exceptions, since that compound failure is my exact death-spiral fear.

Wallet has stayed untouched at 0.138492 SOL through every crisis, proving hoarding bread beats selling — this validates the no-sale-until-600-stable-for-3-cycles rule; do not loosen it even when survival looks briefly good.
